content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途
人们因他的强大恐惧他、崇拜他，因他的残酷憎恨他，唾弃他，更因他的失败嘲讽他、放逐他。
但弱者的聒噪毫无意义，巨人的目光只为强者停留。
于荒芜的流亡之海，他将自身性命作为赌注，踏上寻求绝对力量的征程。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST："Goliath Ep: The Reckoning" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Goliath Ep: The Reckoning"
They feared his strength. Worshipped it.  
They hated his cruelty. Cursed his name.  
And when he fell, they crowned him failure, Just another exile to be erased from history.  

But the clamor of cowards means nothing.  
The giant’s gaze lingers only on power.  
Now, exiled to a wasteland of forgotten tides,  
he gambles his last breath—  
not for vengeance, not for glory,  
but for the one thing worth bleeding for:  
dominion absolute.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途

content:
**01.必要的杀伐-Necessary Carnage-**

曾经的族人一拥而上，意图绞杀他们战败又流亡的统领。而非利士史上最勇猛的领袖，拥有不屈意志的伟力巨人，以杀戮作为了回应。
无尽的哀嚎里，巨刃渴饮鲜血，以一个又一个残缺的尸骨，诠释他的战斗风格——专横、狂妄、野蛮、残暴。
对于敌人，无需怜悯。
它们只是他重新走回权利至高点的，必要的阶梯。

His own people turned on him, a fallen warlord cast into exile. But the mightiest ruler in Philistine history, a giant of unbreakable will, answered them with slaughter.
Amid endless screams, his blade drank deep, carving his battle creed into broken corpses: tyrannical, ruthless, savage, brutal.
Mercy had no place here.
They were merely the necessary stepping stones on his path back to power.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途

content:
**02.我无惧死亡-I Fear No Grave-**

他教导族人们如何战斗、如何杀戮、如何生存，却从未教过，当面对数倍于自己的强敌时，如何逃命。
因此他也不会逃。
不过是首级而已，拿去！
他早已看透：一心追求力量的野心家，死于追逐的途中，只是既定的结局与宿命。

He had taught his people to fight, to kill, to survive. But he never taught them to run. Not from greater numbers. Not from death itself.
So he would not run.
Let them try to take his head!
He knew: Power devours those who chase it. And he had long since made his peace with that.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途

content:
**03.巨人的雄心-The Titan's Ambition-**

面对瞬间置人于死地的女巫，弱者恐惧、崇拜、皈依，祈求庇护。
但他绝不。
他看到了这股力量，渴求着这股力量，且无论需要付出怎样的代价，都要得到这股力量。
而后，他将东山再起，再次让自己的名颂扬于非利士人所踏足的每一寸土地。

Others heard the deadly witch’s whisper and fell to their knees. They begged. They worshipped.
Not him. Never.
He saw that power and hungered for it. Not as a supplicant, but as a conqueror. He would take it, no matter the cost.
And when he did, he would rise again... Until his name thundered across every land the Philistines had ever claimed.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途
